assertion_results.evidence: The impact map specifies concrete changes with exact file paths and specific code artifacts: 'Create modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs — Define AdvisorySeveritySummary response struct with fields: critical, high, medium, low, total'; 'Modify modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs — Add get_advisory_severity_summary method to SbomService that queries the sbom_advisory join table, joins to advisory for severity, groups by severity'; 'Create modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs — Implement GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary handler with optional ?threshold query param, 404 on missing SBOM, caching via tower-http cache middleware with 5-minute TTL'. All entries specify file paths, struct/method names, and behavioral details.
